targetTranslation: definitely written down (possessed by/connected to كِتٰبٍ - book)
ayahArabic: وَكِتٰبٍ مَّسْطُورٍ
ayahEnglish: And [by] a Book inscribed

ayahArabic: فِى رَقٍّ مَّنشُورٍ
ayahEnglish: In parchment spread open

ayahArabic: فِى رَقٍّ مَّنشُورٍ
ayahEnglish: In parchment spread open

targetTranslation: punishment (object of إِنَّ, possessed by رَبِّكَ)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ عَذَابَ رَبِّكَ لَوٰقِعٌ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the punishment of your Lord will occur.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ عَذَابَ رَبِّكَ لَوٰقِعٌ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the punishment of your Lord will occur.

ayahArabic: مَّا لَهُۥ مِن دَافِعٍ
ayahEnglish: Of it there is no preventer.

ayahArabic: يَوْمَ تَمُورُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ مَوْرًا
ayahEnglish: On the Day the heaven will sway with circular motion

targetTranslation: it moves in waves (subject of السَّمَآءُ)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَ تَمُورُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ مَوْرًا
ayahEnglish: On the Day the heaven will sway with circular motion

targetTranslation: with a mighty swaying (describing how السَّمَآءُ moves)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَ تَمُورُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ مَوْرًا
ayahEnglish: On the Day the heaven will sway with circular motion

ayahArabic: وَتَسِيرُ ٱلْجِبَالُ سَيْرًا
ayahEnglish: And the mountains will pass on, departing -

targetTranslation: on that day (referring to the Day of Judgment mentioned in this surah)
ayahArabic: فَوَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then woe, that Day, to the deniers,

targetTranslation: those who (referring to the people who are playing in idle discourse)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى خَوْضٍ يَلْعَبُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who are in [empty] discourse amusing themselves.

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى خَوْضٍ يَلْعَبُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who are in [empty] discourse amusing themselves.

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى خَوْضٍ يَلْعَبُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who are in [empty] discourse amusing themselves.

targetTranslation: they are playing (those who are in vain discourse)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى خَوْضٍ يَلْعَبُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who are in [empty] discourse amusing themselves.

ayahArabic: يَوْمَ يُدَعُّونَ إِلَىٰ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ دَعًّا
ayahEnglish: The Day they are thrust toward the fire of Hell with a [violent] thrust, [its angels will say],

targetTranslation: they are being pushed forcefully (إِلَىٰ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَ يُدَعُّونَ إِلَىٰ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ دَعًّا
ayahEnglish: The Day they are thrust toward the fire of Hell with a [violent] thrust, [its angels will say],

ayahArabic: يَوْمَ يُدَعُّونَ إِلَىٰ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ دَعًّا
ayahEnglish: The Day they are thrust toward the fire of Hell with a [violent] thrust, [its angels will say],

targetTranslation: Hell (being pushed into جَهَنَّمَ in this ayah)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَ يُدَعُّونَ إِلَىٰ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ دَعًّا
ayahEnglish: The Day they are thrust toward the fire of Hell with a [violent] thrust, [its angels will say],

targetTranslation: with forceful pushing (describes how they are pushed)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَ يُدَعُّونَ إِلَىٰ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ دَعًّا
ayahEnglish: The Day they are thrust toward the fire of Hell with a [violent] thrust, [its angels will say],

targetTranslation: which, that (referring to النَّارُ - the fire)
ayahArabic: هٰذِهِ ٱلنَّارُ ٱلَّتِى كُنتُم بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ
ayahEnglish: "This is the Fire which you used to deny.

targetTranslation: you all were (referring to those who denied the truth)
ayahArabic: هٰذِهِ ٱلنَّارُ ٱلَّتِى كُنتُم بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ
ayahEnglish: "This is the Fire which you used to deny.

ayahArabic: هٰذِهِ ٱلنَّارُ ٱلَّتِى كُنتُم بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ
ayahEnglish: "This is the Fire which you used to deny.

targetTranslation: Is it then magic? (connected to هٰذَآ - this)
ayahArabic: أَفَسِحْرٌ هٰذَآ أَمْ أَنتُمْ لَا تُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then is this magic, or do you not see?

ayahArabic: أَفَسِحْرٌ هٰذَآ أَمْ أَنتُمْ لَا تُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then is this magic, or do you not see?

targetTranslation: you (all) perceive/see (in response to أَفَسِحْرٌ هٰذَآ - 'Is this magic?')
ayahArabic: أَفَسِحْرٌ هٰذَآ أَمْ أَنتُمْ لَا تُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then is this magic, or do you not see?

ayahArabic: ٱصْلَوْهَا فَٱصْبِرُوٓا۟ أَوْ لَا تَصْبِرُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْكُمْ إِنَّمَا تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: [Enter to] burn therein; then be patient or impatient - it is all the same for you. You are only being recompensed [for] what you used to do."

ayahArabic: ٱصْلَوْهَا فَٱصْبِرُوٓا۟ أَوْ لَا تَصْبِرُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْكُمْ إِنَّمَا تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: [Enter to] burn therein; then be patient or impatient - it is all the same for you. You are only being recompensed [for] what you used to do."

ayahArabic: ٱصْلَوْهَا فَٱصْبِرُوٓا۟ أَوْ لَا تَصْبِرُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْكُمْ إِنَّمَا تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: [Enter to] burn therein; then be patient or impatient - it is all the same for you. You are only being recompensed [for] what you used to do."

targetTranslation: you (all) are being repaid (for ما كنتم تعملون - what you used to do)
ayahArabic: ٱصْلَوْهَا فَٱصْبِرُوٓا۟ أَوْ لَا تَصْبِرُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْكُمْ إِنَّمَا تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: [Enter to] burn therein; then be patient or impatient - it is all the same for you. You are only being recompensed [for] what you used to do."

ayahArabic: ٱصْلَوْهَا فَٱصْبِرُوٓا۟ أَوْ لَا تَصْبِرُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْكُمْ إِنَّمَا تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: [Enter to] burn therein; then be patient or impatient - it is all the same for you. You are only being recompensed [for] what you used to do."

targetTranslation: you all were (referring to what you used to do)
ayahArabic: ٱصْلَوْهَا فَٱصْبِرُوٓا۟ أَوْ لَا تَصْبِرُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْكُمْ إِنَّمَا تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: [Enter to] burn therein; then be patient or impatient - it is all the same for you. You are only being recompensed [for] what you used to do."

ayahArabic: ٱصْلَوْهَا فَٱصْبِرُوٓا۟ أَوْ لَا تَصْبِرُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْكُمْ إِنَّمَا تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: [Enter to] burn therein; then be patient or impatient - it is all the same for you. You are only being recompensed [for] what you used to do."

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّاتٍ وَنَعِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the righteous will be in gardens and pleasure,

targetTranslation: happy and delighted ones (describing their state)
ayahArabic: فٰكِهِينَ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ وَوَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
ayahEnglish: Enjoying what their Lord has given them, and their Lord protected them from the punishment of Hellfire.

targetTranslation: he gave them (object of فٰكِهِينَ - enjoying)
ayahArabic: فٰكِهِينَ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ وَوَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
ayahEnglish: Enjoying what their Lord has given them, and their Lord protected them from the punishment of Hellfire.

ayahArabic: فٰكِهِينَ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ وَوَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
ayahEnglish: Enjoying what their Lord has given them, and their Lord protected them from the punishment of Hellfire.

targetTranslation: their Lord (who gave them what they enjoy)
ayahArabic: فٰكِهِينَ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ وَوَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
ayahEnglish: Enjoying what their Lord has given them, and their Lord protected them from the punishment of Hellfire.

ayahArabic: فٰكِهِينَ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ وَوَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
ayahEnglish: Enjoying what their Lord has given them, and their Lord protected them from the punishment of Hellfire.

ayahArabic: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you used to do."

targetTranslation: in a very pleasant and beneficial way (describing how to eat and drink in كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟)
ayahArabic: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you used to do."

ayahArabic: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you used to do."

targetTranslation: you all do/work (referring to the actions mentioned in كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟)
ayahArabic: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you used to do."

targetTranslation: those who are reclining (describing the people of Paradise)
ayahArabic: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مَّصْفُوفَةٍ وَزَوَّجْنٰهُم بِحُورٍ عِينٍ
ayahEnglish: They will be reclining on thrones lined up, and We will marry them to fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes.

targetTranslation: on couches/thrones (being reclined upon, as shown by عَلَىٰ)
ayahArabic: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مَّصْفُوفَةٍ وَزَوَّجْنٰهُم بِحُورٍ عِينٍ
ayahEnglish: They will be reclining on thrones lined up, and We will marry them to fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes.

ayahArabic: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مَّصْفُوفَةٍ وَزَوَّجْنٰهُم بِحُورٍ عِينٍ
ayahEnglish: They will be reclining on thrones lined up, and We will marry them to fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes.

targetTranslation: large-eyed ones (describing حُورٍ, showing it follows بِ)
ayahArabic: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مَّصْفُوفَةٍ وَزَوَّجْنٰهُم بِحُورٍ عِينٍ
ayahEnglish: They will be reclining on thrones lined up, and We will marry them to fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes.

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعَتْهُمْ ذُرِّيَّتُهُم بِإِيمٰنٍ أَلْحَقْنَا بِهِمْ ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ وَمَآ أَلَتْنٰهُم مِّنْ عَمَلِهِم مِّن شَىْءٍ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍۭ بِمَا كَسَبَ رَهِينٌ
ayahEnglish: And those who believed and whose descendants followed them in faith - We will join with them their descendants, and We will not deprive them of anything of their deeds. Every person, for what he earned, is retained.

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعَتْهُمْ ذُرِّيَّتُهُم بِإِيمٰنٍ أَلْحَقْنَا بِهِمْ ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ وَمَآ أَلَتْنٰهُم مِّنْ عَمَلِهِم مِّن شَىْءٍ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍۭ بِمَا كَسَبَ رَهِينٌ
ayahEnglish: And those who believed and whose descendants followed them in faith - We will join with them their descendants, and We will not deprive them of anything of their deeds. Every person, for what he earned, is retained.

ayahEnglish: And those who believed and whose descendants followed them in faith - We will join with them their descendants, and We will not deprive them of anything of their deeds. Every person, for what he earned, is retained.

targetTranslation: held as security (as the main description in the sentence)
ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعَتْهُمْ ذُرِّيَّتُهُم بِإِيمٰنٍ أَلْحَقْنَا بِهِمْ ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ وَمَآ أَلَتْنٰهُم مِّنْ عَمَلِهِم مِّن شَىْءٍ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍۭ بِمَا كَسَبَ رَهِينٌ
ayahEnglish: And those who believed and whose descendants followed them in faith - We will join with them their descendants, and We will not deprive them of anything of their deeds. Every person, for what he earned, is retained.

ayahArabic: وَأَمْدَدْنٰهُم بِفٰكِهَةٍ وَلَحْمٍ مِّمَّا يَشْتَهُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We will provide them with fruit and meat from whatever they desire.

ayahArabic: يَتَنٰزَعُونَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا لَّا لَغْوٌ فِيهَا وَلَا تَأْثِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: They will exchange with one another a cup [of wine] wherein [results] no ill speech or commission of sin.

targetTranslation: a cup (being passed around by يَتَنٰزَعُونَ)
ayahArabic: يَتَنٰزَعُونَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا لَّا لَغْوٌ فِيهَا وَلَا تَأْثِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: They will exchange with one another a cup [of wine] wherein [results] no ill speech or commission of sin.

targetTranslation: useless talk (subject of لَّا - 'there is no')
ayahArabic: يَتَنٰزَعُونَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا لَّا لَغْوٌ فِيهَا وَلَا تَأْثِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: They will exchange with one another a cup [of wine] wherein [results] no ill speech or commission of sin.

ayahArabic: يَتَنٰزَعُونَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا لَّا لَغْوٌ فِيهَا وَلَا تَأْثِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: They will exchange with one another a cup [of wine] wherein [results] no ill speech or commission of sin.

ayahArabic: وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ غِلْمَانٌ لَّهُمْ كَأَنَّهُمْ لُؤْلُؤٌ مَّكْنُونٌ
ayahEnglish: There will circulate among them [servant] boys [especially] for them, as if they were pearls well-protected.

ayahArabic: وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ غِلْمَانٌ لَّهُمْ كَأَنَّهُمْ لُؤْلُؤٌ مَّكْنُونٌ
ayahEnglish: There will circulate among them [servant] boys [especially] for them, as if they were pearls well-protected.

ayahArabic: وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ غِلْمَانٌ لَّهُمْ كَأَنَّهُمْ لُؤْلُؤٌ مَّكْنُونٌ
ayahEnglish: There will circulate among them [servant] boys [especially] for them, as if they were pearls well-protected.

targetTranslation: some of them (subject of أَقْبَلَ - came forward)
ayahArabic: وَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they will approach one another, inquiring of each other.

ayahArabic: وَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they will approach one another, inquiring of each other.

ayahArabic: وَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they will approach one another, inquiring of each other.

ayahArabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كُنَّا قَبْلُ فِىٓ أَهْلِنَا مُشْفِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: They will say, "Indeed, we were previously among our people fearful [of displeasing Allāh].

ayahArabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كُنَّا قَبْلُ فِىٓ أَهْلِنَا مُشْفِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: They will say, "Indeed, we were previously among our people fearful [of displeasing Allāh].

ayahArabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كُنَّا قَبْلُ فِىٓ أَهْلِنَا مُشْفِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: They will say, "Indeed, we were previously among our people fearful [of displeasing Allāh].

targetTranslation: our family (after فِي in this ayah)
ayahArabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كُنَّا قَبْلُ فِىٓ أَهْلِنَا مُشْفِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: They will say, "Indeed, we were previously among our people fearful [of displeasing Allāh].

targetTranslation: those who are anxious/fearful (in their homes before judgment)
ayahArabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كُنَّا قَبْلُ فِىٓ أَهْلِنَا مُشْفِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: They will say, "Indeed, we were previously among our people fearful [of displeasing Allāh].

ayahArabic: فَمَنَّ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْنَا وَوَقَىٰنَا عَذَابَ ٱلسَّمُومِ
ayahEnglish: So Allāh conferred favor upon us and protected us from the punishment of the Scorching Fire.

ayahArabic: فَمَنَّ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْنَا وَوَقَىٰنَا عَذَابَ ٱلسَّمُومِ
ayahEnglish: So Allāh conferred favor upon us and protected us from the punishment of the Scorching Fire.

ayahArabic: إِنَّا كُنَّا مِن قَبْلُ نَدْعُوهُ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْبَرُّ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, we used to supplicate Him before. Indeed, it is He who is the Beneficent, the Merciful."

ayahArabic: إِنَّا كُنَّا مِن قَبْلُ نَدْعُوهُ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْبَرُّ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, we used to supplicate Him before. Indeed, it is He who is the Beneficent, the Merciful."

ayahArabic: إِنَّا كُنَّا مِن قَبْلُ نَدْعُوهُ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْبَرُّ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, we used to supplicate Him before. Indeed, it is He who is the Beneficent, the Merciful."

targetTranslation: He (referring to Allah in this ayah)
ayahArabic: إِنَّا كُنَّا مِن قَبْلُ نَدْعُوهُ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْبَرُّ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, we used to supplicate Him before. Indeed, it is He who is the Beneficent, the Merciful."

ayahArabic: فَذَكِّرْ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِنِعْمَتِ رَبِّكَ بِكَاهِنٍ وَلَا مَجْنُونٍ
ayahEnglish: So remind, [O Muḥammad], for you are not, by the favor of your Lord, a soothsayer or a madman.

ayahArabic: فَذَكِّرْ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِنِعْمَتِ رَبِّكَ بِكَاهِنٍ وَلَا مَجْنُونٍ
ayahEnglish: So remind, [O Muḥammad], for you are not, by the favor of your Lord, a soothsayer or a madman.

ayahArabic: فَذَكِّرْ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِنِعْمَتِ رَبِّكَ بِكَاهِنٍ وَلَا مَجْنُونٍ
ayahEnglish: So remind, [O Muḥammad], for you are not, by the favor of your Lord, a soothsayer or a madman.

ayahArabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ شَاعِرٌ نَّتَرَبَّصُ بِهِۦ رَيْبَ ٱلْمَنُونِ
ayahEnglish: Or do they say [of you], "A poet for whom we await a misfortune of time"?

targetTranslation: a poet (what they claim about محمد ﷺ)
ayahArabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ شَاعِرٌ نَّتَرَبَّصُ بِهِۦ رَيْبَ ٱلْمَنُونِ
ayahEnglish: Or do they say [of you], "A poet for whom we await a misfortune of time"?

targetTranslation: we wait and watch intensely (subject of يَقُولُونَ)
ayahArabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ شَاعِرٌ نَّتَرَبَّصُ بِهِۦ رَيْبَ ٱلْمَنُونِ
ayahEnglish: Or do they say [of you], "A poet for whom we await a misfortune of time"?

ayahArabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ شَاعِرٌ نَّتَرَبَّصُ بِهِۦ رَيْبَ ٱلْمَنُونِ
ayahEnglish: Or do they say [of you], "A poet for whom we await a misfortune of time"?

ayahArabic: قُلْ تَرَبَّصُوا۟ فَإِنِّى مَعَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْمُتَرَبِّصِينَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "Wait, for indeed I am, with you, among the waiters."

ayahArabic: قُلْ تَرَبَّصُوا۟ فَإِنِّى مَعَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْمُتَرَبِّصِينَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "Wait, for indeed I am, with you, among the waiters."

targetTranslation: with you all (addressing the disbelievers in تَرَبَّصُوا)
ayahArabic: قُلْ تَرَبَّصُوا۟ فَإِنِّى مَعَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْمُتَرَبِّصِينَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "Wait, for indeed I am, with you, among the waiters."

ayahArabic: أَمْ تَأْمُرُهُمْ أَحْلٰمُهُم بِهٰذَآ أَمْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do their minds command them to [say] this, or are they a transgressing people?

ayahArabic: أَمْ تَأْمُرُهُمْ أَحْلٰمُهُم بِهٰذَآ أَمْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do their minds command them to [say] this, or are they a transgressing people?

ayahArabic: أَمْ تَأْمُرُهُمْ أَحْلٰمُهُم بِهٰذَآ أَمْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do their minds command them to [say] this, or are they a transgressing people?

ayahArabic: أَمْ تَأْمُرُهُمْ أَحْلٰمُهُم بِهٰذَآ أَمْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do their minds command them to [say] this, or are they a transgressing people?

targetTranslation: those who cross boundaries (predicate of هُمْ)
ayahArabic: أَمْ تَأْمُرُهُمْ أَحْلٰمُهُم بِهٰذَآ أَمْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do their minds command them to [say] this, or are they a transgressing people?

ayahArabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ تَقَوَّلَهُۥ بَل لَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do they say, "He has made it up"? Rather, they do not believe.

targetTranslation: he made it up (falsely) (object of يَقُولُونَ)
ayahArabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ تَقَوَّلَهُۥ بَل لَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do they say, "He has made it up"? Rather, they do not believe.

ayahArabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ تَقَوَّلَهُۥ بَل لَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do they say, "He has made it up"? Rather, they do not believe.

ayahArabic: فَلْيَأْتُوا۟ بِحَدِيثٍ مِّثْلِهِۦٓ إِن كَانُوا۟ صٰدِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then let them produce a statement like it, if they should be truthful.

ayahArabic: فَلْيَأْتُوا۟ بِحَدِيثٍ مِّثْلِهِۦٓ إِن كَانُوا۟ صٰدِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then let them produce a statement like it, if they should be truthful.

ayahArabic: فَلْيَأْتُوا۟ بِحَدِيثٍ مِّثْلِهِۦٓ إِن كَانُوا۟ صٰدِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then let them produce a statement like it, if they should be truthful.

targetTranslation: they were created (referring to the disbelievers being questioned in this ayah)
ayahArabic: أَمْ خُلِقُوا۟ مِنْ غَيْرِ شَىْءٍ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْخٰلِقُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or were they created by nothing, or were they the creators [of themselves]?

ayahArabic: أَمْ خُلِقُوا۟ مِنْ غَيْرِ شَىْءٍ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْخٰلِقُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or were they created by nothing, or were they the creators [of themselves]?

ayahArabic: أَمْ خُلِقُوا۟ مِنْ غَيْرِ شَىْءٍ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْخٰلِقُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or were they created by nothing, or were they the creators [of themselves]?

ayahArabic: أَمْ خُلِقُوا۟ مِنْ غَيْرِ شَىْءٍ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْخٰلِقُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or were they created by nothing, or were they the creators [of themselves]?

ayahArabic: أَمْ خَلَقُوا۟ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بَل لَّا يُوقِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or did they create the heavens and the earth? Rather, they are not certain.

ayahArabic: أَمْ خَلَقُوا۟ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بَل لَّا يُوقِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or did they create the heavens and the earth? Rather, they are not certain.

ayahArabic: أَمْ عِندَهُمْ خَزَآئِنُ رَبِّكَ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْمُصَۣيْطِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or have they the depositories [containing the provision] of your Lord? Or are they the controllers [of them]?

ayahArabic: أَمْ عِندَهُمْ خَزَآئِنُ رَبِّكَ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْمُصَۣيْطِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or have they the depositories [containing the provision] of your Lord? Or are they the controllers [of them]?

ayahArabic: أَمْ عِندَهُمْ خَزَآئِنُ رَبِّكَ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْمُصَۣيْطِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or have they the depositories [containing the provision] of your Lord? Or are they the controllers [of them]?

ayahArabic: أَمْ عِندَهُمْ خَزَآئِنُ رَبِّكَ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْمُصَۣيْطِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or have they the depositories [containing the provision] of your Lord? Or are they the controllers [of them]?

ayahArabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ سُلَّمٌ يَسْتَمِعُونَ فِيهِ فَلْيَأْتِ مُسْتَمِعُهُم بِسُلْطٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Or have they a stairway [into the heaven] upon which they listen? Then let their listener produce a clear authority [i.e., proof].

targetTranslation: they are listening carefully (referring to the disbelievers in فَلْيَأْتِ مُسْتَمِعُهُم)
ayahArabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ سُلَّمٌ يَسْتَمِعُونَ فِيهِ فَلْيَأْتِ مُسْتَمِعُهُم بِسُلْطٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Or have they a stairway [into the heaven] upon which they listen? Then let their listener produce a clear authority [i.e., proof].

ayahArabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ سُلَّمٌ يَسْتَمِعُونَ فِيهِ فَلْيَأْتِ مُسْتَمِعُهُم بِسُلْطٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Or have they a stairway [into the heaven] upon which they listen? Then let their listener produce a clear authority [i.e., proof].

ayahArabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ سُلَّمٌ يَسْتَمِعُونَ فِيهِ فَلْيَأْتِ مُسْتَمِعُهُم بِسُلْطٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Or have they a stairway [into the heaven] upon which they listen? Then let their listener produce a clear authority [i.e., proof].

targetTranslation: you ask them (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier)
ayahArabic: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍ مُّثْقَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do you, [O Muḥammad], ask of them a payment, so they are by debt burdened down?

targetTranslation: a payment/reward (object of تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ - you ask them)
ayahArabic: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍ مُّثْقَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do you, [O Muḥammad], ask of them a payment, so they are by debt burdened down?

targetTranslation: a heavy debt, a severe penalty (that weighs them down)
ayahArabic: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍ مُّثْقَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do you, [O Muḥammad], ask of them a payment, so they are by debt burdened down?

ayahArabic: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍ مُّثْقَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do you, [O Muḥammad], ask of them a payment, so they are by debt burdened down?

ayahArabic: أَمْ عِندَهُمُ ٱلْغَيْبُ فَهُمْ يَكْتُبُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or have they [knowledge of] the unseen, so they write [it] down?

ayahArabic: أَمْ عِندَهُمُ ٱلْغَيْبُ فَهُمْ يَكْتُبُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or have they [knowledge of] the unseen, so they write [it] down?

ayahArabic: أَمْ يُرِيدُونَ كَيْدًا فَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلْمَكِيدُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do they intend a plan? But those who disbelieve - they are the object of a plan.

targetTranslation: a secret plan (object of يُرِيدُونَ/they want)
ayahArabic: أَمْ يُرِيدُونَ كَيْدًا فَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلْمَكِيدُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do they intend a plan? But those who disbelieve - they are the object of a plan.

ayahArabic: أَمْ يُرِيدُونَ كَيْدًا فَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلْمَكِيدُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do they intend a plan? But those who disbelieve - they are the object of a plan.

ayahArabic: أَمْ يُرِيدُونَ كَيْدًا فَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلْمَكِيدُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do they intend a plan? But those who disbelieve - they are the object of a plan.

ayahArabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ إِلٰهٌ غَيْرُ ٱللَّهِ سُبْحٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or have they a deity other than Allāh? Exalted is Allāh above whatever they associate with Him.

ayahArabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ إِلٰهٌ غَيْرُ ٱللَّهِ سُبْحٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or have they a deity other than Allāh? Exalted is Allāh above whatever they associate with Him.

targetTranslation: of Allah (object of سُبْحٰنَ/glory be to)
ayahArabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ إِلٰهٌ غَيْرُ ٱللَّهِ سُبْحٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or have they a deity other than Allāh? Exalted is Allāh above whatever they associate with Him.

ayahArabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ إِلٰهٌ غَيْرُ ٱللَّهِ سُبْحٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or have they a deity other than Allāh? Exalted is Allāh above whatever they associate with Him.

ayahArabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ إِلٰهٌ غَيْرُ ٱللَّهِ سُبْحٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or have they a deity other than Allāh? Exalted is Allāh above whatever they associate with Him.

ayahArabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ إِلٰهٌ غَيْرُ ٱللَّهِ سُبْحٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or have they a deity other than Allāh? Exalted is Allāh above whatever they associate with Him.

targetTranslation: they see (subject of يَقُولُوا۟ - they say)
ayahArabic: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ كِسْفًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ سَاقِطًا يَقُولُوا۟ سَحَابٌ مَّرْكُومٌ
ayahEnglish: And if they were to see a fragment from the sky falling, they would say, "[It is merely] clouds heaped up."

targetTranslation: a piece/fragment (object of يَرَوْا - they see)
ayahArabic: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ كِسْفًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ سَاقِطًا يَقُولُوا۟ سَحَابٌ مَّرْكُومٌ
ayahEnglish: And if they were to see a fragment from the sky falling, they would say, "[It is merely] clouds heaped up."

ayahArabic: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ كِسْفًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ سَاقِطًا يَقُولُوا۟ سَحَابٌ مَّرْكُومٌ
ayahEnglish: And if they were to see a fragment from the sky falling, they would say, "[It is merely] clouds heaped up."

ayahArabic: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ كِسْفًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ سَاقِطًا يَقُولُوا۟ سَحَابٌ مَّرْكُومٌ
ayahEnglish: And if they were to see a fragment from the sky falling, they would say, "[It is merely] clouds heaped up."

ayahArabic: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ كِسْفًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ سَاقِطًا يَقُولُوا۟ سَحَابٌ مَّرْكُومٌ
ayahEnglish: And if they were to see a fragment from the sky falling, they would say, "[It is merely] clouds heaped up."

ayahArabic: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ كِسْفًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ سَاقِطًا يَقُولُوا۟ سَحَابٌ مَّرْكُومٌ
ayahEnglish: And if they were to see a fragment from the sky falling, they would say, "[It is merely] clouds heaped up."

ayahArabic: فَذَرْهُمْ حَتَّىٰ يُلٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى فِيهِ يُصْعَقُونَ
ayahEnglish: So leave them until they meet their Day in which they will be struck insensible -

ayahArabic: فَذَرْهُمْ حَتَّىٰ يُلٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى فِيهِ يُصْعَقُونَ
ayahEnglish: So leave them until they meet their Day in which they will be struck insensible -

targetTranslation: who/which/that (connects to يُصْعَقُونَ - they will be struck)
ayahArabic: فَذَرْهُمْ حَتَّىٰ يُلٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى فِيهِ يُصْعَقُونَ
ayahEnglish: So leave them until they meet their Day in which they will be struck insensible -

ayahArabic: فَذَرْهُمْ حَتَّىٰ يُلٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى فِيهِ يُصْعَقُونَ
ayahEnglish: So leave them until they meet their Day in which they will be struck insensible -

ayahArabic: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُمْ كَيْدُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: The Day their plan will not avail them at all, nor will they be helped.

targetTranslation: he makes (something/someone) free from need (subject of كَيْدُهُمْ)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُمْ كَيْدُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: The Day their plan will not avail them at all, nor will they be helped.

ayahArabic: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُمْ كَيْدُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: The Day their plan will not avail them at all, nor will they be helped.

ayahArabic: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُمْ كَيْدُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: The Day their plan will not avail them at all, nor will they be helped.

ayahArabic: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُمْ كَيْدُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: The Day their plan will not avail them at all, nor will they be helped.

ayahArabic: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُمْ كَيْدُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: The Day their plan will not avail them at all, nor will they be helped.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ عَذَابًا دُونَ ذٰلِكَ وَلٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, for those who have wronged is a punishment before that, but most of them do not know.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ عَذَابًا دُونَ ذٰلِكَ وَلٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, for those who have wronged is a punishment before that, but most of them do not know.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ عَذَابًا دُونَ ذٰلِكَ وَلٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, for those who have wronged is a punishment before that, but most of them do not know.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ عَذَابًا دُونَ ذٰلِكَ وَلٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, for those who have wronged is a punishment before that, but most of them do not know.

targetTranslation: most of them (subject of لَا يَعْلَمُونَ)
ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ عَذَابًا دُونَ ذٰلِكَ وَلٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, for those who have wronged is a punishment before that, but most of them do not know.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ عَذَابًا دُونَ ذٰلِكَ وَلٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, for those who have wronged is a punishment before that, but most of them do not know.

ayahArabic: وَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ فَإِنَّكَ بِأَعْيُنِنَا وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ
ayahEnglish: And be patient, [O Muḥammad], for the decision of your Lord, for indeed, you are in Our eyes [i.e., sight]. And exalt [Allāh] with praise of your Lord when you arise

ayahArabic: وَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ فَإِنَّكَ بِأَعْيُنِنَا وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ
ayahEnglish: And be patient, [O Muḥammad], for the decision of your Lord, for indeed, you are in Our eyes [i.e., sight]. And exalt [Allāh] with praise of your Lord when you arise

ayahArabic: وَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ فَإِنَّكَ بِأَعْيُنِنَا وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ
ayahEnglish: And be patient, [O Muḥammad], for the decision of your Lord, for indeed, you are in Our eyes [i.e., sight]. And exalt [Allāh] with praise of your Lord when you arise

ayahArabic: وَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ فَإِنَّكَ بِأَعْيُنِنَا وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ
ayahEnglish: And be patient, [O Muḥammad], for the decision of your Lord, for indeed, you are in Our eyes [i.e., sight]. And exalt [Allāh] with praise of your Lord when you arise
